corrections.text: The article puts inside quote marks the phrase 'AI features depend on Warp's backend services, preventing fully self-hosted experiences' attributed to Kilo Blog. The source's actual wording is different: 'AI features still depend on Warp's backend services, so even if you build from source, you're not getting a fully self-hosted experience.' The substance is the same — the open-source client cannot be fully self-hosted because the platform layer (Oz, Warp Drive) is closed — but the quote-marked phrase is a paraphrase, not verbatim source text. The quote marks should be removed or the wording should match the source verbatim.
